items.docs: Returns information about the currently authenticated user, including their URI, name, email, scheduling URL, timezone, and organization membership.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the user.

items.docs: Returns information about a specific user by their UUID, including name, email, scheduling URL, timezone, and organization.

params.name: user
params.description: The URI of the user whose event types to list. Required if organization is not specified.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose event types to list. Required if user is not specified.

params.name: active
params.description: Filter by active status. When true, only active event types are returned.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Use name:asc or name:desc.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of event types for the specified user or organization. Event types define the kinds of meetings that can be scheduled, including their duration, location, and availability.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the event type.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific event type by its UUID, including its name, duration, scheduling URL, and configuration.
Creates a single-use event type that can be used for a one-time scheduling session. One-off event types are not listed on the users scheduling page.

params.name: event_type
params.description: The URI of the event type to check availability for.

params.name: start_time
params.description: The start of the time range to check, in UTC format.

params.name: end_time
params.description: The end of the time range to check, in UTC format.

items.docs: Returns a list of available time slots for a specific event type within a given date range. This endpoint is used to display bookable times to potential invitees.

params.name: user
params.description: The URI of the user whose busy times to retrieve.

params.name: start_time
params.description: The start of the time range to check, in UTC format.

params.name: end_time
params.description: The end of the time range to check, in UTC format.

items.docs: Returns a list of time periods during which a user is busy, based on their connected calendars. Useful for checking a users availability before scheduling.

params.name: user
params.description: The URI of the user whose availability schedules to retrieve.

items.docs: Returns a list of availability schedules for a specific user. Availability schedules define the recurring time windows when a user is available for meetings.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the availability schedule.

items.docs: Returns a specific availability schedule by its UUID, including the timezone and rules that define available time windows.

params.name: user
params.description: The URI of the user whose scheduled events to list.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose scheduled events to list.

params.name: invitee_email
params.description: Filter by invitee email address.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by event status.

params.name: min_start_time
params.description: Only return events starting on or after this time, in UTC format.

params.name: max_start_time
params.description: Only return events starting before this time, in UTC format.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Use start_time:asc or start_time:desc.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of scheduled events for the specified user or organization. Scheduled events represent booked meetings with start and end times, locations, and associated invitees.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the scheduled event.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific scheduled event by its UUID, including start and end times, event type, location, and cancellation details if applicable.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the scheduled event.

items.docs: Cancels a scheduled event. Optionally include a reason for the cancellation. This will trigger invitee.canceled webhook events for all subscribed endpoints.

params.name: event_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the scheduled event.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by invitee status.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results. Use created_at:asc or created_at:desc.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of invitees for a specific scheduled event. Invitee data includes name, email, timezone, and answers to custom questions from the booking page.

params.name: event_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the scheduled event.

params.name: invitee_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the invitee.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific invitee for a scheduled event, including their name, email, timezone, and answers to custom questions on the event booking page.

Creates a new invitee for a scheduled event, effectively booking a meeting on behalf of the invitee. This is the core endpoint of the Scheduling API, enabling programmatic event creation without redirects, iframes, or the Calendly-hosted UI. Requires a paid Calendly plan.

params.name: user
params.description: The URI of the user whose webhook subscriptions to list.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose webhook subscriptions to list.

params.name: scope
params.description: The scope of the webhook subscription. Use user for subscriptions scoped to a specific user, or organization for organization-wide subscriptions.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of webhook subscriptions for the specified user or organization. Each subscription defines the events to listen for and the callback URL to notify.
Creates a new webhook subscription to receive real-time notifications when scheduling events occur. You can subscribe to invitee.created, invitee.canceled, and routing_form_submission.created events.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the webhook subscription.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific webhook subscription by its UUID, including the callback URL, subscribed events, and scope.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the webhook subscription.

items.docs: Deletes a webhook subscription by its UUID. Once deleted, the subscription will no longer receive event notifications.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose memberships to list.

params.name: user
params.description: Filter by user URI.

params.name: email
params.description: Filter by user email address.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of organization memberships. Each membership represents a users role and status within an organization.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the organization membership.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific organization membership, including the users role and status within the organization.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the organization membership to remove.

items.docs: Removes a user from an organization by deleting their membership. This action cannot be undone.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the organization.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter invitations by status.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of pending invitations for the specified organization.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the organization.

items.docs: Sends an invitation to a user to join the organization. The invitee will receive an email with instructions to accept the invitation.

params.name: org_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the organization.

params.name: invitation_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the invitation.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific organization invitation.

params.name: org_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the organization.

params.name: invitation_uuid
params.description: The UUID of the invitation to revoke.

items.docs: Revokes a pending organization invitation. The invitee will no longer be able to accept the invitation.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose routing forms to list.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of routing forms for the specified organization. Routing forms are questionnaires that direct invitees to the appropriate scheduling page based on their responses.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the routing form.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific routing form, including its questions and routing rules.

params.name: routing_form
params.description: The URI of the routing form whose submissions to list.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of submissions for a specific routing form, including the answers provided by each submitter.

params.name: uuid
params.description: The UUID of the routing form submission.

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific routing form submission.
Submits a request to delete invitee data for data compliance purposes such as GDPR. The deletion is processed asynchronously.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose activity log to retrieve.

params.name: min_occurred_at
params.description: Only return entries that occurred on or after this time.

params.name: max_occurred_at
params.description: Only return entries that occurred before this time.

params.name: search_term
params.description: Filter entries by a search term.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order for results.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of activity log entries for the specified organization. Activity logs record actions taken by users within the organization.
Creates a shareable scheduling link that can be distributed to potential invitees. Shares can include multiple event types and custom availability settings.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization whose groups to list.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of groups within the specified organization. Groups allow organizing users into teams for scheduling purposes.

params.name: group
params.description: The URI of the group to list relationships for.

params.name: organization
params.description: The URI of the organization.

params.name: count
params.description: The number of results to return per page.

params.name: page_token
params.description: A token for fetching the next page of results from a previous paginated response.

items.docs: Returns a paginated list of group memberships, showing which users belong to which groups within an organization.
